domains.description: All data describing who shoppers are, where they live, and how they are segmented.

entities.description: Demographic and household profile dimensions used to classify and segment customers.
entities.name: Customer Segmentation

columns.description: Internal unique identifier for each client demographic profile record.
columns.name: client_profile_record

columns.description: Client credit rating segment: Good, Low Risk, High Risk, or Unknown.
columns.name: credit_rating

columns.description: Number of dependents in the client's household currently attending college, from 0 to 6.
columns.name: dependent_college_count

columns.description: Total number of dependents in the client's household, from 0 to 6.
columns.name: dependent_count

columns.description: Number of employed dependents in the client's household, from 0 to 6.
columns.name: dependent_employed_count

columns.description: Client education segment, ranging from Primary through Advanced Degree.
columns.name: education_status

columns.description: Client gender segment: Male (M) or Female (F).
columns.name: gender

columns.description: Client marital status segment: Single, Married, Divorced, Widowed, or Unknown.
columns.name: marital_status

columns.description: Estimated annual purchase amount for the client, in dollars.
columns.name: purchase_estimate

tables.description: Demographic segment combinations covering gender, marital status, education, credit rating, and dependent counts.
tables.grain: One row per unique demographic segment combination
tables.name: client_profiles

columns.description: Estimated annual spending potential of the household, expressed as a dollar range such as '0-500', '1001-5000', or '>10000'.
columns.name: buy_potential

columns.description: Number of dependents in the household, ranging from 0 to 9.
columns.name: dependent_count

columns.description: Internal unique identifier for each household profile segment record.
columns.name: household_profile_record

columns.description: Links the household profile to an income band in the income_ranges table, indicating the household's estimated annual income tier.
columns.name: income_range_ref

columns.description: Number of vehicles owned by the household, with -1 indicating unknown or not applicable.
columns.name: vehicle_count

tables.description: Household-level segments capturing income range, buying potential, dependent count, and vehicle ownership.
tables.grain: One row per unique household segment combination
tables.name: household_profiles

entities.description: Core customer account records linking identity, address, and demographic segments.
entities.name: Shopper

columns.description: Country where the customer was born, used for demographic and geographic analysis.
columns.name: birth_country

columns.description: Day of the month the customer was born, used for birthday-based analysis.
columns.name: birth_day

columns.description: Month the customer was born, used for age and birthday analysis.
columns.name: birth_month

columns.description: Year the customer was born, used to calculate age and generational segments.
columns.name: birth_year

columns.description: Business-facing customer identifier used to reference a shopper across systems.
columns.name: client_code

columns.description: Internal system identifier uniquely identifying each client record.
columns.name: client_record

columns.description: Links the client to their current mailing or residential address.
columns.name: current_address_ref

columns.description: Links the client to their active demographic profile record.
columns.name: current_client_profile_ref

columns.description: Links the client to their active household profile record.
columns.name: current_household_profile_ref

columns.description: Customer's email address used for digital communications and account identification.
columns.name: email_address

columns.description: Customer's first or given name.
columns.name: first_name

columns.description: Calendar day of the customer's first purchase, indicating when they first bought from the business.
columns.name: first_sale_calendar_day_ref

columns.description: Calendar day of the customer's first shipment, indicating when they first received an order.
columns.name: first_shipping_calendar_day_ref

columns.description: Customer's last name or surname.
columns.name: last_name

columns.description: Calendar day of the most recent review or account assessment for the customer.
columns.name: last_review_calendar_day_ref

columns.description: Customer's login or username for online account access.
columns.name: login

columns.description: Indicates whether the customer is a preferred or loyalty-tier shopper.
columns.name: preferred_client_flag

columns.description: Customer's preferred title or salutation, such as Mr., Mrs., Dr., or Ms.
columns.name: salutation

tables.description: Central shopper account records linking each person to their address, demographic profile, and purchase tenure.
tables.grain: One row per customer account
tables.name: clients

domains.name: Customer

domains.description: Campaigns, promotions, mailer pages, and digital site content driving customer activity.

entities.description: Marketing promotions and offers run across channels.
entities.name: Campaigns

columns.description: Business-facing alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies each marketing campaign.
columns.name: campaign_code

columns.description: The name or label assigned to the marketing campaign.
columns.name: campaign_name

columns.description: Internal row identifier for each marketing campaign record.
columns.name: campaign_record

columns.description: Free-text description providing additional details about the campaign's channel or messaging approach.
columns.name: channel_details

columns.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the direct mail channel (Y/N).
columns.name: channel_direct_mail

columns.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the email channel (Y/N).
columns.name: channel_email

columns.description: Indicates whether this campaign used an event-based channel (Y/N).
columns.name: channel_event

columns.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the catalog mailer channel (Y/N).
columns.name: channel_mailer

columns.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the press or print media channel (Y/N).
columns.name: channel_press

columns.description: Indicates whether this campaign used profile-based or targeted demographic channel (Y/N).
columns.name: channel_profile

columns.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the radio channel (Y/N).
columns.name: channel_radio

columns.description: Indicates whether this campaign used the television channel (Y/N).
columns.name: channel_tv

columns.description: The total budget or spend associated with running this marketing campaign.
columns.name: cost

columns.description: Indicates whether a discount was active during this campaign (Y/N).
columns.name: discount_active

columns.description: The calendar day when the campaign ended, linked to the calendar_days reference table.
columns.name: end_calendar_day_ref

columns.description: The product promoted by this campaign, linked to the merchandise table.
columns.name: merchandise_ref

columns.description: The stated purpose or objective of the marketing campaign.
columns.name: purpose

columns.description: The target number of customer responses expected from this campaign.
columns.name: response_target

columns.description: The calendar day when the campaign began, linked to the calendar_days reference table.
columns.name: start_calendar_day_ref

tables.description: Campaign records describing promotions, their channels, timing, associated products, and budget costs.
tables.grain: One row per marketing campaign
tables.name: marketing_campaigns

entities.description: Website pages and online properties used in digital commerce.

columns.description: City where the online property's registered address is located.
columns.name: city

columns.description: Classification or tier of the online property. Currently shows 'Unknown' for all records.
columns.name: class

columns.description: Reference to the calendar day when the online property closed or was decommissioned. Null if still active.
columns.name: closure_calendar_day_ref

columns.description: Numeric code identifying the company or business entity that owns the online property.
columns.name: company_code

columns.description: Name of the company or business entity that owns the online property.
columns.name: company_name

columns.description: Country where the online property's address is located.
columns.name: country

columns.description: County where the online property's address is located.
columns.name: county

columns.description: Name of the manager responsible for the online property or website.
columns.name: manager

columns.description: Descriptive classification label for the market region associated with the online property.
columns.name: market_class

columns.description: Numeric code identifying the market region the online property belongs to.
columns.name: market_code

columns.description: Longer narrative description of the market region for the online property.
columns.name: market_description

columns.description: Name of the manager responsible for the market region the online property belongs to.
columns.name: market_manager

columns.description: Display name of the online property or website.
columns.name: name

columns.description: Business-facing code that identifies a specific online property or website across its historical record versions.
columns.name: online_property_code

columns.description: Internal row identifier for each online property record version. Used as a primary key to join online purchases and refunds.
columns.name: online_property_record

columns.description: Reference to the calendar day when the online property first opened or launched.
columns.name: opening_calendar_day_ref

columns.description: Date when this version of the online property record expired. Null indicates the currently active version.
columns.name: record_effective_end

columns.description: Date when this version of the online property record became active.
columns.name: record_effective_start

columns.description: US state where the online property's address is located.
columns.name: state

columns.description: Street name of the online property's registered or operational address.
columns.name: street_name

columns.description: Street number of the online property's registered or operational address.
columns.name: street_number

columns.description: Street type suffix for the online property's address, such as Avenue, Boulevard, or Drive.
columns.name: street_type

columns.description: Suite or unit number within the building at the online property's address.
columns.name: suite_number

columns.description: Sales tax rate applied to purchases made through this online property.
columns.name: tax_percentage

columns.description: UTC timezone offset for the online property's location, used for time-of-day analysis.
columns.name: timezone_offset

columns.description: Postal ZIP code for the online property's registered address.
columns.name: zip

tables.description: Website and digital commerce property records with site identity, market, company, and tax details.
tables.grain: One row per website property version (slowly changing)
tables.name: online_properties

columns.description: Calendar day reference indicating the most recent date the website page was accessed.

columns.description: Indicates whether the website page was automatically generated by the system.

columns.description: Web address (URL) of the website page.

columns.name: second

columns.description: Work shift period (first, second, or third) associated with the time of day.
columns.name: shift

columns.description: Finer time-of-day period such as morning, afternoon, evening, or night.
columns.name: sub_shift

tables.description: Time-of-day dimension with one record per second, including shift, sub-shift, and meal period attributes.

tables.name: clock_times

domains.description: Purchase transactions across store, online, and mail-order channels.

entities.description: Purchase transactions originating from catalog or mailer channels.
entities.name: Mail-Order Sales

columns.description: The billing address associated with the mail-order purchase, linking to the addresses table.
columns.name: billing_address_ref

columns.description: The demographic profile of the billing customer at the time of the mail-order purchase, linking to the client_profiles table.
columns.name: billing_client_profile_ref

columns.description: The customer account responsible for payment on the mail-order purchase, linking to the clients table.
columns.name: billing_client_ref

columns.description: The household segment of the billing customer at the time of the mail-order purchase, linking to the household_profiles table.
columns.name: billing_household_profile_ref

columns.description: The marketing campaign or promotional offer associated with the mail-order purchase, linking to the marketing_campaigns table.
columns.name: campaign_ref

columns.description: The total coupon or voucher savings applied to this mail-order line item.
columns.name: coupon_amount

columns.description: The shipping or delivery method used for the mail-order order, linking to the delivery_methods table.
columns.name: delivery_method_ref

columns.description: The total shipping or delivery cost charged for this mail-order line item.
columns.name: extended_delivery_cost

columns.description: The total discount applied across all units in this mail-order line item (quantity × per-unit discount).
columns.name: extended_discount_amount

columns.description: The total value of this mail-order line item at the full list price before discounts (quantity × list price).
columns.name: extended_list_price

columns.description: The total revenue from this mail-order line item at the actual sales price (quantity × sales price).
columns.name: extended_sales_price

columns.description: The total tax amount applied to this mail-order line item.
columns.name: extended_tax

columns.description: The total wholesale cost for this mail-order line item (quantity × wholesale cost per unit).
columns.name: extended_wholesale_cost

columns.description: The warehouse or fulfillment center that shipped the mail-order order, linking to the fulfillment_centers table.
columns.name: fulfillment_center_ref

columns.description: The standard retail or catalog list price per unit for the product in this mail-order line item.
columns.name: list_price

columns.description: The catalog or mailer page that prompted the mail-order purchase, linking to the mailer_pages table.
columns.name: mailer_page_ref

columns.description: The product sold in the mail-order transaction, linking to the merchandise catalog table.
columns.name: merchandise_ref

columns.description: The net amount paid by the customer for this mail-order line item, excluding tax and delivery charges.
columns.name: net_paid

columns.description: The net amount paid by the customer for this mail-order line item, including delivery charges but excluding tax.
columns.name: net_paid_with_delivery

columns.description: The fully loaded amount paid by the customer for this mail-order line item, including both delivery charges and tax.
columns.name: net_paid_with_delivery_tax

columns.description: The net amount paid by the customer for this mail-order line item, including tax but excluding delivery charges.
columns.name: net_paid_with_tax

columns.description: The profit or loss on this mail-order line item, calculated as net revenue minus wholesale cost.
columns.name: net_profit

columns.description: The mail-order order identifier, grouping multiple line items that belong to the same customer order.
columns.name: order_number

columns.description: The number of units of the product ordered in this mail-order line item.
columns.name: quantity

columns.description: The calendar date when the mail-order purchase was placed, linking to the calendar_days reference table.
columns.name: sale_calendar_day_ref

columns.description: The time of day when the mail-order purchase was placed, linking to the clock_times reference table.
columns.name: sale_clock_time_ref

columns.description: The actual per-unit price charged to the customer for the product in this mail-order line item, after discounts.
columns.name: sales_price

columns.description: The delivery address for the mail-order shipment, linking to the addresses table.
columns.name: shipping_address_ref

columns.description: The calendar date when the mail-order purchase was shipped, linking to the calendar_days reference table.
columns.name: shipping_calendar_day_ref

columns.description: The demographic profile of the shipping recipient at the time of the mail-order purchase, linking to the client_profiles table.
columns.name: shipping_client_profile_ref

columns.description: The customer account receiving the mail-order shipment, linking to the clients table.
columns.name: shipping_client_ref

columns.description: The household segment of the shipping recipient at the time of the mail-order purchase, linking to the household_profiles table.
columns.name: shipping_household_profile_ref

columns.description: The customer support or call center that handled the mail-order purchase, linking to the support_centers table.
columns.name: support_center_ref

columns.description: The per-unit cost paid by the business to acquire the product for this mail-order line item.
columns.name: wholesale_cost
